cleavage agent: Proteins bound to the GFP-Trap®_A beads were digested using trypsin
collision energy: HCD fragmentation with normalised collision energy of 33
enrichment method: Immunoprecipitation was performed using GFP-Trap®_A Kit
fragmentation method: HCD fragmentation with normalised collision energy of 33
instrument: analysed on a Thermo Orbitrap Fusion
ionization type: converted to gas-phase ions by means of electrospray ionisation
labeling: the peptides were analysed by LC-MS/MS
